title: Dataset Worldwide Survey on the Impact of AI Chatbots and Large Language Models in Dental Education: Insights from Dental Educators
author: Uribe, Sergio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains responses from participants regarding their awareness, knowledge, and perceptions of AI-powered tools in dental education. The data was collected during May-June 2023 to investigate the potential enhancement that AI can bring to dental education. The dataset includes variables related to participants' demographics, experiences, perceptions, and opinions.  

  Details in the published protocol by Uribe, S. E., & Maldupa, I. (2023, June 2). Chatbots In Dental Education - Research Protocol. https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/3BSG2
